texto: Kay was only half skinny-dipping, but she fervently wished she’d worn something a bit more substantial than a baseball cap and the bottom half of the quintessential teeny-weenie yellow polka-dot bikini.
explicacao: Citação de Babette James sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Kay was only half skinny-dipping, but she fervently wished she’d worn something a bit more substa…” articula reflexao, contemporary-romance, skinny em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Trouble was, everyone always made talking out a problem sound like it was so simple and solved everything, but actually doing it, and securing the desired outcome without screwing up, seemed about as easy as rowing upriver with a teaspoon.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Babette James: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Trouble was, everyone always made talking out a problem sound like it was so simple and solved ev…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, contemporary-romance, trouble pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
